title: Mortality - A Terramity Addon
description: Mortality adds new content and weapons, minibosses and resource farming methods, but most importantly, Structures and Dungeons to Conquer!
body:
Requires:
Terramity, GeckoLib, CuriosApi, (Highly Recommended) Better Combat

**Description:**

Mortality was created to tackle an issue of mine originally with the fact that late game, resources are needed in larger quantities, yet do not become more common, yet it has evolved into a fully fledged addon that will be receiving loads of development and updates over time!
This Addon primarily features new structures, currently staring, **3**, distinct structures to be found and fought through for more loot and rewards than one may find plausible. Additionally some structures come packed with  their own **Minibosses**, Gear, Weapons and Curios as well as new Mobs to fight against!

**Structures:**


<details>
<summary>Uvogre_Village</summary>
The Uvogre village is a simple set of structures made by simpler minded beings. Brutaly strung together, it doesnt hold many riches- Most certainly a place to avoid given its sinister inhabitants- However if youve attained a level of power and confidence, feel as free to be to dive onto those walking clumps of hp as you wish!
</details>


<details>
<summary>Redwood_Facility</summary>
The Redwood Facility is a grand Dungeon that stands tall in old growth spruce and pine taigas. Functioning as all, refinery, forestry, machinery and most importantly a mining facility. It is swarmed by the dead and machines of old times, set to kill. It holds great rewards as many as it does risks if entered! Expect to take a hike if you wish to go about its capture safely...
</details>


<details>
<summary>Daemonfort</summary>
The Daemonfort is a massive dungeon found within the nether, a stronghold for the daemon race- Traditionalistic warriors who value victors, this dungeon is both overrun with loot, but also dangerous foes such as its three Minibosses, the Daemon Brutes and Templars, wielding grand hammers and blades, thick in armor- as well as the Infernal Cores, Fire spewing Constructs for refining alloy's of the highest quality. Should one find themselves within, anticipate to get lost swiftly...
</details>
